response.name: Example

request.description:
These `result` objects are returned by the **Facebook Page Details Export** crawler.

| **Field**          | Type            | Description                                                                                             |
|--------------------|-----------------|---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| **id**             | integer         | Unique identifier for this result record.                                                               |
| **object**         | string          | Always "result".                                                                                         |
| **squid**          | string          | Hash ID of the squid that produced this result.                                                         |
| **run**            | string          | Hash ID of the run during which this result was fetched.                                                |
| **about**          | string or null  | "About" section content of the Facebook page, if available.                                             |
| **address**        | string or null  | Physical address of the business or page, if listed.                                                    |
| **category**       | string          | Page category (e.g., "Local Business").                                                                 |
| **email**          | string or null  | Contact email address scraped from the page’s About or Contact section.                                 |
| **followers**      | string          | Number of page followers (text, e.g., "4").                                                              |
| **functions**      | object or null  | Reserved for function-specific metadata (currently null).                                               |
| **image_url**      | string          | URL of the page’s profile or cover image.                                                               |
| **instagram**      | string or null  | Instagram profile URL if listed on the page.                                                           |
| **internal_id**    | string          | Facebook’s internal page identifier.                                                                    |
| **likes**          | string          | Number of page likes (text, e.g., "4").                                                                  |
| **menu**           | string or null  | URL of the page’s menu or services section, if available.                                               |
| **name**           | string          | Name of the Facebook page.                                                                              |
| **native_id**      | integer         | Native scraper ID for the page (often same as `id`).                                                    |
| **phone**          | string or null  | Contact phone number listed on the page.                                                                |
| **price**          | string or null  | Price information if provided (rare for Facebook pages).                                                |
| **reviews**        | integer         | Number of reviews the page has received.                                                                |
| **score**          | number          | Average rating score (e.g., 0–5).                                                                        |
| **scraping_time**  | string (ISO)    | Timestamp when this result was fetched (e.g., "2025-05-02T08:17:12.353Z").                              |
| **slug**           | string          | URL path slug for the page (e.g., "/pages/tri-phase-construction-llc/591768754194714/").                 |
| **status**         | string          | Scrape status of the page (e.g., "valid_page").                                                         |
| **url**            | string          | Full URL to the Facebook page.                                                                          |
| **visits**         | integer         | Number of page visits if available (e.g., view count).                                                  |
| **wesbite**        | string or null  | Website URL scraped from the page’s About or Contact section (field misspelled “wesbite” in response).  |

response.name: Example
